query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality within 50 metres of 200-year storm-surge areas, sorted by shortest distance first, and report both municipality and county.

2.description: Select 200-year storm-surge polygons filtered to Kristiansand municipality using kommunenummer

3.description: Select buildings in Kristiansand with geometry and kommunenummer

4.description: Spatially join buildings to storm-surge polygons within 50m and compute distances

5.description: Join resulting buildings to fylker to get county names

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE lower(kommunenavn) = 'kristiansand';

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM stormflohavniva_03618ac2d6ba4ba0ae13e7ead6caf572.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'));
